overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The character moves from a covered alleyway onto neon-lit streets with holographic billboards, passing pedestrians and vehicles in a futuristic urban environment with wet reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway leading to main street

events.description: character exits covered walkway into open neon-lit street
dramatic increase in illumination from surrounding neon billboards and street lights

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly covered walkway toward the brightly lit street ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead of ego toward the street exit

entered.detail: metal roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway with support beams
large red digital screen displaying a stylized white skull logo
rectangular concrete barrier blocks along the left side of the walkway
dark building facade with horizontal green neon light strip

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit covered walkway with concrete barriers on the left and a dark building wall on the right. Ahead, a large red digital billboard with a skull logo is visible at the walkway exit. The environment is sheltered and sparsely populated with few pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city street with large digital advertising displays and wet reflective pavement

events.description: fully exits covered walkway onto open sidewalk with neon-lit buildings
black futuristic car drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the street, passing by illuminated billboards and storefronts

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan driving down the wet street

entered.detail: large vertical digital display showing a woman's face with blue and white colors
tall cyan-colored digital advertisement screen visible down the street
tall street light illuminating the wet pavement with white light
reflective wet road surface with red and white lane markings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide-open city street bathed in neon light from massive digital billboards. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful lights. A black car drives past on the left while the character continues along the sidewalk, passing from the covered walkway into the vibrant urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with graffiti-covered walls and commercial storefronts

events.description: entering area with prominent graffiti-covered concrete walls and trash bags
passing by multiple pedestrians walking in opposite direction on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk passing various pedestrians and storefronts with illuminated signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shorts and dark top walking past ego in opposite direction

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti including NCPD text and various tags
commercial building entrance with illuminated orange and red awning
rectangular metal drainage grates embedded in the concrete sidewalk
piles of garbage bags stacked against the graffiti wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sidewalk bordered by a graffiti-covered wall on the right featuring colorful tags and trash bags. The area has a more gritty urban feel with metal drainage grates on the pavement. Several pedestrians walk past in the opposite direction as the character moves past storefronts with illuminated awnings.

scene_state.functional_zone: inclined sidewalk with concrete stairs and overpass ahead

events.description: approaching concrete stairs on the right and an inclined ramp leading upward
walking up the inclined sidewalk alongside the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up an inclined sidewalk next to a flight of concrete stairs, approaching an overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: flight of concrete stairs running parallel to the sidewalk on the right side
concrete retaining wall with large white graffiti text reading PAURE
elevated bridge or overpass structure visible ahead spanning the street

segments.scene_description: The character ascends an inclined sidewalk with concrete stairs on the right side. The left side features a concrete wall with large white graffiti text. An overpass bridge is visible ahead in the distance. The character continues walking uphill, passing another pedestrian ahead on the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, dimly lit corridor into the vibrant, neon-drenched expanse of a futuristic city street. It begins within a covered walkway, moving past concrete barriers and dark walls toward a red digital billboard featuring a skull logo. As the character reaches the exit, the scene opens up and the lighting shifts abruptly from shadow to a kaleidoscope of neon hues. The camera then transitions onto a wide sidewalk where the wet asphalt reflects the glow of massive digital billboards, passing a black car as it drives by in the open urban environment.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty urban corridor that gradually ascends toward a distant overpass. It begins on a sidewalk bordered by graffiti-covered walls and piles of trash bags, moving past illuminated storefront awnings and metal drainage grates as pedestrians pass in the opposite direction. As the character progresses, the flat pavement shifts into an inclined path, leading the camera upward alongside a concrete wall marked with large white text. The scene then opens up to reveal a concrete staircase on the right and an overpass bridge looming in the distance before finally following the character uphill past another pedestrian.
